summary: 12 film announcements, 8 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: The Musical
film.talent: Rob Lowe, Will Brill, Gillian Jacobs
film.announcement: Blue Harbor and Variance acquire U.S. distribution rights to the Sundance film starring Rob Lowe, Will Brill, and Gillian Jacobs.

film.title: Hollow
film.talent: Sydney Sweeney starring; Lindsey Anderson Beer writing and directing; LuckyChap producing
film.announcement: Sony acquires the 'Sleepy Hollow' package with Sydney Sweeney starring, Lindsey Anderson Beer writing and directing, and LuckyChap Entertainment producing.

film.title: How The Cookie Crumbles
film.talent: Giorgia Whigham, Trevor Wallace, Alyssa Milano, Shea Whigham
film.announcement: R-rated comedy film leads Giorgia Whigham, Trevor Wallace, Alyssa Milano, and Shea Whigham.

film.title: Kaet Might Die
film.talent: Jimmi Simpson, Ben Wang, Zosia Mamet
film.announcement: Mercedes Bryce Morgan's dark comedy adds Jimmi Simpson, Ben Wang, and Zosia Mamet to its cast.

film.title: The Drill
film.announcement: Rowan Blanchard stars in school shooting-themed dark comedy directed by Millicent Hailes.

film.title: I Want To Feel Fun
film.announcement: Michaela Watkins stars in Jessica Sanders' improvised indie comedy.

film.title: Bender
film.talent: Bill Burr, Chris O'Dowd, Ruari Spooner
film.announcement: Harry Potter series star Ruari Spooner joins Bill Burr and Chris O'Dowd in comedy film Bender.

film.title: Mussau: The First Song
film.announcement: Indigenous missionary biopic to shoot in Papua New Guinea with Indian National Film Award winner Bijukumar Damodaran directing.

film.title: Act Of Service
film.talent: Ilie Mitaru directing; Alex Lieberman producing
film.announcement: Documentary focusing on equine therapy for incarcerated veterans directed by Ilie Mitaru with Alex Lieberman producing.

film.title: Mortal Kombat 2
film.announcement: Mortal Kombat 2 sets HBO Max release date for theatrical film.

film.title: Time and Tide
film.announcement: Sydney Film Festival winner Time and Tide lands at Paris-based Inwave Films.

film.title: Mini War
film.talent: Brett Gelman, Kevin Nealon, Rob Morgan
film.announcement: Comedy film adds Brett Gelman, Kevin Nealon, and Rob Morgan to its cast.

tv.title: The Ultimate Self-Defense Championship: Female-Focused Spinoff
tv.announcement: The Ultimate Self-Defense Championship launches female-focused spinoff series on YouTube.

tv.title: This Summer Will Be Different
tv.talent: Roby Attal as Felix; Francesca Reale as Bridget
tv.announcement: Netflix series adds Roby Attal as Felix and Francesca Reale as Bridget to cast.

tv.title: Stuart Fails To Save The Universe
tv.talent: John Ross Bowie as Kripke; original Big Bang Theory leads
tv.announcement: Big Bang Theory spinoff adds John Ross Bowie as Kripke alongside original three Big Bang leads in nod to Lost in Space.

tv.title: God of War
tv.announcement: Prime Video series recasts lead Kratos role following Ryan Hurst's on-set injury.

tv.title: Jakarta
tv.announcement: Multi-generational crime series unites Iko Uwais and director Albert Hughes at Alcon Entertainment.

tv.title: Boys of Tommen
tv.talent: Jamie Schneider as Patrick Feely; James Craven as Pierce O'Neill
tv.announcement: Series finds Jamie Schneider as Patrick Feely and James Craven as Pierce O'Neill in cast additions.

tv.title: One Hundred Years of Solitude
tv.announcement: Netflix plans special premiere events in Colombia for the grand finale of Part 2 of epic series.

tv.title: Queenstown
tv.announcement: Netflix unveils Queenstown as its first original New Zealand series.
